---
title: "MarineDebris"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
# Load required libraries
library(tidyverse)

# ── 1. Load the data ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
df <- read_csv("all_data.csv")
```

Summary of Statistics

```{r}
cat("=== DIMENSIONS ===\n")
cat("Rows:", nrow(df), " | Columns:", ncol(df), "\n\n")

cat("=== COLUMN NAMES & TYPES ===\n")
glimpse(df)

cat("\n=== FIRST 6 ROWS ===\n")
print(head(df))

cat("\n=== SUMMARY STATISTICS ===\n")
print(summary(df))
```

Class Distribution

```{r}
label_map <- c("1" = "Water", "2" = "Plastic", "3" = "Driftwood",
               "4" = "Seaweed", "5" = "Pumice", "6" = "Sea Snot", "7" = "Sea Foam")

cat("\n=== CLASS DISTRIBUTION ===\n")
class_counts <- df %>%
  count(label) %>%
  mutate(
    class_name = label_map[as.character(label)],
    pct        = round(n / sum(n) * 100, 2)
  ) %>%
  arrange(label)

print(class_counts)
```

Bar plot of class distribution

```{r}
ggplot(class_counts, aes(x = reorder(class_name, label), y = n, fill = class_name)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(pct, "%")), vjust = -0.4, size = 3.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(
    title    = "Class Distribution in all_data.csv",
    subtitle = "Highly imbalanced dataset",
    x        = "Class",
    y        = "Pixel Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1))
```

Box plot (feature distribution by class: Claude

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

# ── Load data ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
df <- read_csv("all_data.csv")

# ── Label mapping ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
label_map <- c("1" = "Water", "2" = "Plastic", "3" = "Driftwood",
               "4" = "Seaweed", "5" = "Pumice", "6" = "Sea Snot", "7" = "Sea Foam")

df <- df %>%
  mutate(class_name = factor(label_map[as.character(label)],
                             levels = label_map))

# ── Get numeric feature columns (excluding label) ────────────────────────────
feature_cols <- df %>% select(where(is.numeric), -label) %>% names()

# ── Pivot to long format for faceted plotting ─────────────────────────────────
df_long <- df %>%
  select(class_name, all_of(feature_cols)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-class_name, names_to = "feature", values_to = "value")

# ── Box plot: one facet per feature ───────────────────────────────────────────
ggplot(df_long, aes(x = class_name, y = value, fill = class_name)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.3, outlier.alpha = 0.3, show.legend = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~ feature, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  labs(
    title = "Feature Distribution by Class",
    x     = "Class",
    y     = "Value"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x  = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1, size = 8),
    strip.text   = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title   = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14)
  )

# ── Save plot ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ggsave("boxplot_all_features.png", width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 150)
cat("Plot saved to boxplot_all_features.png\n")
```

```{r}
df %>%
  select(class_name, all_of(key_features)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-class_name, names_to = "feature", values_to = "value") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = value, fill = class_name, colour = class_name)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.3, linewidth = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~ feature, scales = "free") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  scale_colour_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  labs(title = "Density Plots — Key Spectral Indices",
       subtitle = "Overlapping curves reveal class separability",
       x = "Value", y = "Density", fill = "Class", colour = "Class") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "bottom")
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(leaflet)

df <- read_csv("all_data.csv")

label_map <- c("1" = "Water", "2" = "Plastic", "3" = "Driftwood",
               "4" = "Seaweed", "5" = "Pumice", "6" = "Sea Snot", "7" = "Sea Foam")

df <- df %>%
  mutate(class_name = factor(label_map[as.character(label)], levels = label_map))

df_sample <- df %>% group_by(class_name) %>% slice_sample(n = 300)

pal <- colorFactor(palette = "Set2", domain = df_sample$class_name)

#MAP(Ithink)
leaflet(df_sample) %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  addCircleMarkers(
    lng         = ~Longitude,
    lat         = ~Latitude,
    color       = ~pal(class_name),
    radius      = 4,
    stroke      = FALSE,
    fillOpacity = 0.7,
    popup       = ~paste("Class:", class_name)
  ) %>%
  addLegend("bottomright", pal = pal, values = ~class_name, title = "Class")
```
